content.rule: Use to show progress of a task such as uploads, data processing, or form completion.
Use percentages or absolute numbers when progress can be measured.
Use visual-only indicators with a looping animation when the system is working but the length or quantity is unknown.
Upon completion, transition to success state, confirmation message, or next step.

content.dont: Avoid freezing the progress indicator -- always provide user feedback if stalled.

contexts: Screenshot 2026-03-10 at 3.33.50 PM - progress bar in loading context

notes: Content lead's note: Based on guidelines research, we do need to add some text to the current design, such as 'Loading Studio', or whatever is appropriate.
